creator: mirya@matrix.ua
text:
After recent KDE 3.5.3->3.5.4 update (kdebase + kdelibs) kcontrol modules are not detected. Symptoms:
1) When running kcontrol, no modules are present in left tree view.
2) stdout reports: "kcontrol: WARNING: No K menu group with X-KDE-BaseGroup=settings found ! Defaulting to Settings/" (/usr/local/share/desktop-directories/kde-settings.directory is present and contains "X-KDE-BaseGroup=settings")
3) All started apps except kicker, its applets and kdesktop, display non-antialiased fonts (fallback to default configuration?)

Fix: 

no idea
How-To-Repeat: Upgrade KDE as stated
